mapper.select: SELECT symbol, name, country, currency, exchange, finnhub_industry, market_cap, share_outstanding, logo, weburl, raw_json, fetched_at FROM company_profile WHERE symbol = #{symbol}

SELECT p.symbol, p.name, p.finnhub_industry, p.market_cap, q.current_price, m.pe_normalized_annual, m.pb_annual, m.roe_ttm FROM company_profile p LEFT JOIN stock_quote_cache q ON q.symbol = p.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_metric_snapshot m ON m.symbol = p.symbol AND m.metric_date = ( SELECT MAX(metric_date) FROM stock_metric_snapshot WHERE symbol = p.symbol ) WHERE p.finnhub_industry = #{industry} ORDER BY p.market_cap DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_profile ( symbol, name, country, currency, exchange, finnhub_industry, market_cap, share_outstanding, logo, weburl, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{name}, #{country}, #{currency}, #{exchange}, #{finnhubIndustry}, #{marketCap}, #{shareOutstanding}, #{logo}, #{weburl}, #{rawJson}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), country = VALUES(country), currency = VALUES(currency), exchange = VALUES(exchange), finnhub_industry = VALUES(finnhub_industry), market_cap = VALUES(market_cap), share_outstanding = VALUES(share_outstanding), logo = VALUES(logo), weburl = VALUES(weburl), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
